info.title: Clap.Net CLI tool for generating OpenCLI JSON schemas and shell completions

options.name: --assembly
options.description: Path to the assembly containing Clap.Net commands

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path (default: <assembly-name>-cli.json or shell-specific default)

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: json, bash, zsh, fish, powershell (default: json)

options.name: --command-name
options.description: Override command name in generated completions (default: inferred from assembly)
